core_findings: Clean-dev vNext scalar geometry is strongly separated and internally successful.
External VitaminC diagnostic collapses into NOT_ENTITLED.
Product-gate collapse was observed, but router ablations did not recover external performance.
Clean/external scalar geometry shift is confirmed.
Surface/format shift is the likely root cause: clean data is lexical-overlap/template-heavy, while external data is paraphrastic/open-domain.
locked_interpretation: ContraMamba-vNext minimal learns a strong clean-controlled epistemic geometry, but that geometry is tied to lexical-overlap/template-heavy clean distribution. Under open-domain fact-verification format shift, SUPPORT/REFUTE examples often fail to enter the model's judgment-enabled frame/predicate/polarity manifold and collapse to NOT_ENTITLED.
do_not: Do not continue router ablation as the main path.
Do not tune thresholds on VitaminC.
Do not add bridge/synthetic external append yet.
